agents.reason: Codex 默认 sub-agent mode：用户完成 explicit post-planning review 后，派发 trellis-implement 实现 #60 workspace boundary guard。实现代理必须先校验 pwd、repo root 和 planning approval，再在 task worktree 中修改文件。
Codex 默认 sub-agent mode：实现代理完成后派发 trellis-check 对 #60 workspace boundary guard 执行 Phase 2 检查。
代码/文档提交 1e2e78ae1259165c61a5dfdb4826abd6edc730a5 后，按 Guru Team workflow 派发 fresh independent Branch Review 最终放行审查代理，覆盖 origin/main...HEAD 完整 diff 并写 task-local 中文 raw report 与 review.md rollup。
Branch Review 第 001 轮发现 P2 release/version 合同问题后，主会话修复 Guru Team extension revision 到 0.6.5-guru.2，派发新的阶段二检查代理复核版本修复、dogfood manifest、文档/tag 示例和测试验证。
替代第 001 轮中断的最终审查代理，专门闭环 P2 release/version finding；该代理不作为最终放行审查代理使用。
第 001 轮 P2 finding 已由第 002 轮问题闭环审查代理确认闭环后，派发 fresh 最终放行审查代理审查当前 HEAD ff59c2db866d0414b7a736205a26ed9da004eecf 的完整 origin/main...HEAD diff，并写 round-003-final.md 与更新 review.md rollup。

本轮在 Branch Review Gate validator 中新增 replacement closure chain 支持并同步 workflow/spec/docs/overlay/installed copy/test 后，按 Guru Team workflow 重新派发阶段二检查代理复核当前未提交非 metadata diff；主会话只记录检查结果，不用自身验证替代 Phase 2 AI check。

代码提交 3af6ee1d99fcbae862ef993efa851111c9874a96 后，按 Guru Team workflow 派发 fresh independent Branch Review 最终放行审查代理，重新覆盖 origin/main...HEAD 完整 diff，尤其复核 replacement closure chain validator、workflow/spec/docs/overlay/dogfood installed copies 与 issue scope。

review_rounds.reuse_policy: fresh independent final review；连接中断且发现 1 个 P2 finding，本轮只能作为问题发现轮次，不能作为最终通过轮次。

replacement closure review for round 001 P2 release/version finding; original final reviewer was interrupted and could not close its finding, so this replacement only closes the finding and cannot be final.
fresh final review after round 001 P2 finding was closed by round 002 replacement closure review; this agent did not find prior findings and is last review round.
fresh final review after replacement closure chain validator commit; reviewer did not own prior findings or replacement closure and reviewed current origin/main...HEAD full diff.

reuse_decisions.reason: 第 001 轮 agent 019f4138-c274-7ce3-97d4-66ae456b8ccb 在写出 P2 finding 后 stream disconnected，且其文件写入工具把 review.md 与 raw report 误写到 source checkout；主会话已迁移报告并清理 source checkout。该技术 agent 无法继续作为同 agent 闭环审查代理，因此由替代问题闭环审查代理 019f41ee-a6ba-7d93-86a3-5f3afafed93a 复核同一 P2 finding，round 2 findings_count=0。
